title: Review: fix contact_set, space_set atomicity, typing phantom, batch limit
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — one correctness bug that crashes the daemon in debug builds on adversarial input (i64 overflow), one pre-existing RFC violation not addressed (non-Object patch silently dropped), one documented spec violation for server errors deferred without tracking. The rest of the changes are protocol-correct and well-tested.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) did not trace the full contact_query_changes path to check for the same position+limit pattern, (2) did not verify the typing phantom test actually exercises the relay's disconnect cleanup path vs. a transport-level close that never reaches the relay handler. Would raise confidence if: run tests in debug mode with position=i64::MAX input, inspect relay/src/ws.rs disconnect handler to confirm typing synthesis fires on WS close.
